# ~~parseCoffeeJson()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseCoffeeJson(text: string): {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  size: string;
  price: number;
  iced: boolean;
  caffeineMg: number;
};
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts:86](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts#L86)

Parses a JSON string and validates it as a single [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md)
entity.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type     | Description                                                                                            |
| --------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `text`    | `string` | A JSON string representing a [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) object. |

## Returns

The decoded [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entity.

| `name`       | `string`  | `Schema.String`  | Display name of the coffee drink (e.g., "Flat White", "Espresso"). | [src/app/service/coffee/types.ts:52](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/types.ts#L52) |

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use
`Schema.decodeUnknownSync(CoffeeSchema)(JSON.parse(text))`
directly instead.

## Remarks

Calls `JSON.parse` then pipes the result through the pre-compiled
[decodeCoffee](#) decoder.  Throws a `ParseResult` error
if the parsed value does not conform to [CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md).

## Throws

If the parsed value does not conform to
[CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md).
